final:
// // Asynchronous reset functionality for D flip-flop
module top_module(
    output reg Q,
    input D,
    input clk,
    input sr
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (sr) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous reset functionality for D flip-flop
